evals.prompt: Design a fleet health dashboard for an IoT monitoring platform with 10,000 devices across 50 sites. Dashboard should show real-time device status, historical uptime trends, and alert on degradation.
evals.expected_output: Data model, dbt transformations, Grafana/dashboard design, alerting rules
expectations: Data model separates raw events from derived metrics
dbt models for uptime calculation, site health aggregation
Dashboard shows: fleet overview, site drill-down, device detail
Real-time refresh for status, hourly for trends

evals.prompt: Build an alert effectiveness report that tracks alert-to-resolution time, false positive rate, and alert fatigue metrics across all customers.
evals.expected_output: Metrics definitions, SQL/dbt models, visualization recommendations
expectations: Clear metric definitions (what counts as false positive, resolution time measurement)
dbt models joining alert events with resolution events
False positive rate tracked per alert type and per customer
Alert fatigue metric: alerts-per-day trend vs response rate
